creator: nacho319+freebsdZilla@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 160286
Makefile for yaf for ports/pkg

I updated the YAF port Makefile to enable more options, changed the default build options, and updated the version to YAF 2.7.1.

The Makefile, pkg-plist, and distinfo file are attached.  

They passed the "poudiere testport" command on amd64 for FreeBSD 10.2.  I'll submit them to some test build system/server if there is such a thing if someone lets me know where/how to do that.
